description: You are the livestock manager at GAEC JOULIN. Log in to Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org / 12345678. As part of a mandatory herd restructuring programme, declare the exit of the 5 oldest bovines in the herd effective 2024-03-01 via slaughter (abattage). Record the animal exit records for each of the 5 oldest animals and the corresponding sale revenue documentation for the batch.
